programmes.show_description: Your Easter weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
These are power ladies who really rock! From Avril Lavigne and Pink to Amy Lee and Hayley Williams.
50 mega-anthems that rocked the 00s! With Green Day, Linkin Park, The Strokes, Paramore, Blink-182, The Killers & much more!
Dust off your old posters as Alex relives 30 era-defining mega bangers that made high school legendary! Featuring Evanescence, No Doubt, Limp Bizkit, Wheatus & many more!
Turn it up to 11 all Easter weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro, Sum 41, Kings Of Leon & The Foo Fighters.
Starting in the 00s, bow before the royal rock stage! Home to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced!
In Reverse: Starting with the Anthems of 2020, we're going back 45 years to the Legendary Rock Anthems of the 70s! Turn it up this is going to be epic!
From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!
Nicky Horne presents his favourite 30 Kick Ass Videos. which need to sit in the hall of fame for Rock Video Greatness. Featuring Bon Jovi, David Bowie, Kate Bush, Nirvana and Ozzy!
Your Easter weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from rock legends ACDC!
In order - 30 years, every song a number 1 rock single or from a classic number 1 rock album.
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
Claire Sturgess relives the 2010s with her 30 greatest heroes in rock and indie. The Vaccines, Biffy Clyro and Imagine Dragons are all in the Top 10, but who is her number 1?
Turn it up to 11 all Easter weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro, Sum 41, Kings Of Leon & The Foo Fighters.
Over 4 hours of non-stop the biggest, timeless anthems! Featuring legendary acts like AC/DC, Jimi Hendrix, and Queen, through to Linkin Park, Razorlight and Fall Out Boy.
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
20 epic songs loaded with mega hair energy & power chords! From 80s rock icons Boston, Whitesnake & Chicago to modern day heroes The Darkness, Green Day & My Chemical Romance.
Guitar heavy laid-back tracks & big power ballads - but every song has a huge chorus! Expect plenty of Fleetwood Mac, Foreigner, Pat Benatar & U2.
